title: Techomancer Origin
body:
This datapack adds the Techomancer origin to minecraft, heres a list of all its features:
- Redstone Storage: You can carry up to 64 Redstone with you to charge your Gadgets, you must be sneaking to add Redstone to it
- Experienced Crafter: The Techomancer can access a crafting table tab without needing the table itself
- Complex Weapons: You learned every think you could about crossbows, making you extremely good using them
- Tinkers Pouch: You have a special inventory that allows you to carry up to 5 different items
- Technomancy: You can use redstone equipment in unique ways. (sculk sensor, piston, tnt)
- Weak Body: Your body is physically weaker.(You have 6 hearts)
- Unskilled Fighter: Due to spending most of your life studying redstone you never learned how to wield swords, axes or bows and cant use them to fight.
